question: What is the rack-level DC power requirement of the NVIDIA GB200 NVL72?
findings: The GB200 NVL72 rack configuration includes two groupings of 3x 1U 33kW Power Shelves, for a total of six 33kW shelves depicted in the rack diagram.
The source documents do not state an explicit rack-level DC power figure (e.g., total kW draw or requirement) for the GB200 NVL72; only the power shelf configuration is listed.
The GB200 NVL72 is a fully liquid-cooled rack-scale design featuring 36 NVIDIA Grace CPUs and 72 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, up to 13.5 TB of HBM3E, and a 130 TB/s NVLink domain.
Each GB200 NVL72 compute tray is a 1U liquid-cooled server node with 2x Grace CPUs and 4x Blackwell GPUs, equipped with 2x Superchip cold plate loops for liquid cooling.

research_gaps.description: No power delivery or PDU infrastructure guidance found.
No UPS or battery backup requirements found.
